prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.6 kg; Height 151.1 cm; BMI 23.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.1%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 221mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 52.2kg; 9 months ago 56.1kg; 6 months ago 51.7kg; 3 months ago 54.3kg; current 54.6kg), Height (12 months ago 151.1cm; 9 months ago 151.1cm; 6 months ago 151.1cm; 3 months ago 151.1cm; current 151.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 77mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 76U/L; 9 months ago 75U/L; 6 months ago 74U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 81U/L), AST (12 months ago 84U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 76U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 84U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; current 100mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 100mg/g; 9 months ago 72mg/g; 6 months ago 73mg/g; 3 months ago 98mg/g; current 85mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 103mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 105mg/dL; 3 months ago 121mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.7g/dL; 9 months ago 15.3g/dL; 6 months ago 15.2g/dL; 3 months ago 15.2g/dL; current 15.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
